title: Ubiquiti UACC-G4-INS-Cable-USB-4.5M - G4 Instant PoE cable, 4.5m
description: High-quality connecting USB-C cable 4.5m long , which is used for power and data between the UniFi Protect G4 Instant camera and the reduction from USB-C to Ethernet UACC -Adapter-PoE-USBC. The cable is terminated on one side with a straight USB-C connector and on the other side with angled USB-C connector. The cable has a diameter of 3.5 mm
